Create: Dimension – Steamworks Realm

A New Industrial Mining Dimension for the Create Mod!

Create: Dimension, Steamworks Realm introduces a brand-new mining-focused dimension, designed for automation and large-scale resource extraction. This world is filled with rich veins of ores, mechanical landscapes, and steam-powered environments, perfect for players looking to expand their Create Mod builds with advanced mining systems.

Features:

⛏ New Mining Dimension: A unique realm designed for large-scale automated mining using Create machines.

🪨 Exclusive Ores & Resources: Mine rare materials that can enhance your Create automation and machinery.
🛠 Customizable Mining Automation: Use drills, conveyors, and rotational power to fully automate your mining operations.

How to Access the Steamworks Realm:

🚂 Construct a special mining portal using Andesite Block!
🔥 Ignite with the Steamworks Realm Portal Igniter: Activate the portal using this unique tool to travel to the mining dimension!

Bring your Create Mod experience to the next level with Create: Dimension, Steamworks Realm the ultimate mining expansion for industrial automation!
